title: euphrasia tatarica var. simplex
intro: Euphrasia tatarica var. simplex, also known as the Tatarian eyebright, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Euphrasia tatarica var. simplex include its ability to soothe and calm irritated eyes, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Euphrasia tatarica var. simplex can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, particularly those related to the eyes and respiratory system.
